title: Extract Customer IDs
scenario: Extract customer IDs from the following customer data: Customer 1: ID-123, Customer 2: ID-456, Customer 3: ID-789. The output should be a list of extracted IDs.
constraints: Must be in the format of an array
Must be under 100 characters per ID

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the output meets the format and character constraints.
Verify if each extracted ID starts with 'ID-' and has 3 digits.
